findings.evidence: `rg` shows the used distribution lemmas are in `Mathlib/RingTheory/Coalgebra/Convolution.lean:115` and `:155`; `Mathlib/RingTheory/HopfAlgebra/Basic.lean:9` already imports `Coalgebra.Convolution`, while `Bialgebra.Convolution.lean` provides `AlgHom`/`BialgHom` convolution instances not referenced in `HopfAlgebra.lean`.
findings.fix: Remove this import and rely on `Mathlib.RingTheory.HopfAlgebra.Basic`, which already publicly imports `Mathlib.RingTheory.Coalgebra.Convolution`; keep `FunctorOfPoints.lean` importing `Bialgebra.Convolution` directly because it uses the algebra-hom convolution API.
findings.issue: `import Mathlib.RingTheory.Bialgebra.Convolution` is unused here; the file only uses linear-map convolution/distribution lemmas and Hopf basics, not the algebra-hom or bialgebra-hom convolution API from that module.

summary: The new Hopf API is in the algebraic-group support area, but one import is evidently broader than the file uses.
